allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: remove project_id from render_presets \(global-only presets\)

- Drop project_id column, FK, index from render_presets table
- Remove project_id from model, schemas \(Create/Response\), router filter
- Revert frontend RenderPresetsTab to global fetch without projectId prop
- Remove project_id from frontend RenderPreset type

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: VideoScene.image_prompt_ko AttributeError 수정 및 테스트 추가

- scene_processing.py: getattr\(\)로 안전한 속성 접근 \(VideoScene에 없는 필드 방어\)
- scene_processing.py: raise from 패턴으로 B904 lint 수정
- tts_postprocess.py: 공백 lint 수정
- test_tts_postprocess.py: validate_tts_quality 5개 + VideoScene extra fields 3개 테스트 추가
- test_groups.py: FK constraint 테스트 IntegrityError로 수정

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(for f in services/generation.py services/storyboard.py routers/prompt.py schemas.py)
